sourceMovie.title: Hard Target
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hard Target works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hard Target clicked for you, John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hard Target?
faq.answer: Try John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum, John Wick: Chapter 4, Lethal Weapon—each shares DNA with Hard Target while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hard Target?
faq.answer: Hard Target (1993) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hard Target part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Hard Target Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
